insights.text:
Coaches don't have time to navigate through complex menus during the match.
Coaches want to quickly see the physical condition of players (stamina, injury risk).
Technical staff needs short and clear instructions
During the break in the match, coaches have time for more detailed analysis

hmws.question: How might we help coaches access critical information instantly during the match?

answers.text: A dashboard with 3 major indicators: stamina, injury risk, performance.
Smart alerts that appear automatically when a player drops below a certain threshold

hmws.question: How might we simplify the interface so coaches don’t waste time navigating menus?

answers.text: A menu with 4 large buttons: Tactics, Players, Opponent, Alerts.
Quick gestures (swipe left/right) to switch between screens.
